no: CG Female Human Fighter Uses READLN for dialogue timer selection (1-6). Choose 1 for 1hr standard. Requires manual input. ACTION_READLN stall — mod prompts for dialogue timer selection (1-6) during install. Mod_installer now auto-responds with 1 in automated mode.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Adds Navarra, a Chaotic Good female human Barbarian NPC to BG2 with a romance for non-evil males, a personal quest in the Bridge District, and banters with all Bioware NPCs.

co.no: ACTION_READLN — STALLS automated installs. blocked for 35+ minutes waiting for dialog timer input (1-6). Installer must pipe answer '1' (1hr default) or use --force-install with READLN auto-answer. Not bypassable with --force-install alone.

in.t: Uses ACTION_READLN for dialogue timer selection (1-6). Requires manual input.
